mapper.insert: insert into sys_user (username, password, nickname, avatar, phone, email, gender, role_id, status, create_time, update_time) values (#{username}, #{password}, #{nickname}, #{avatar}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{gender}, #{roleId}, #{status}, now(), now())
mapper.update: update sys_user set password = #{password}, update_time = now() where id = #{id}

update sys_user
nickname = #{nickname},
phone = #{phone},
email = #{email},
gender = #{gender},
avatar = #{avatar},
update_time = now()
where id = #{id}
update sys_user set status = #{status}, update_time = now() where id = #{id}
